title: Ophryoscleria riparia
taxonomy: Ophryoscleria riparia is classified as a species within the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. It belongs to the genus Ophryoscleria, which is a group of aquatic sedges. The classification of Ophryoscleria riparia is primarily based on its morphology, anatomy, and genetic features. Further classification may involve its phylogenetic relationships with other species within the Cyperaceae family.
